{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged hunger
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]]' mouth is filled with fangs of [[Forged hunger]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
